              <div class="setting-control"><span id="setBuildDate">—</span></div>
            </div>
            <div class="setting-row">
              <div><div class="setting-label">Klavye Kısayolları</div></div>
              <div class="setting-control"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="setShowKeys">Görüntüle</button></div>
            </div>
            <div class="setting-row">
              <div><div class="setting-label">Güncelleme Kontrolü</div></div>
              <div class="setting-control"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="setCheckUpdate">Kontrol Et</button></div>
            </div>
            <div class="setting-row">
              <div><div class="setting-label" style="color:var(--danger)">Tüm Verileri Sil</div><div class="setting-desc">Geri alınamaz!</div></div>
              <div class="setting-control"><button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:var(--danger)" id="setNukeData">🗑️ Sil</button></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /main-area -->
</div><!-- /app -->

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     MINI PLAYER
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="miniPlayer" class="hidden">
  <div class="mp-header">
    <span id="mpChName">—</span>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:4px">
      <button class="icon-btn" id="mpExpand" title="Genişlet">⛶</button>
      <button class="icon-btn" id="mpClose" title="Kapat">✕</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="mp-body">
    <video id="mpThumbVideo" muted playsinline></video>
  </div>
  <div class="mp-controls">
    <button class="pc-btn" id="mpPlayBtn">▶</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PIP WINDOW
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="pipWin" class="hidden">
  <div id="pipTitleBar">
    <span id="pipChName">—</span>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:4px">
      <button class="icon-btn" id="pipFullBtn" title="Genişlet">⛶</button>
      <button class="icon-btn" id="pipCloseBtn" title="Kapat">✕</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pip-body">
    <video id="pipVideo" muted playsinline></video>
    <div id="pipResize"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="pip-controls">
    <button class="pc-btn" id="pipPlayBtn">▶</button>
    <button class="pc-btn" id="pipMuteBtn">🔊</button>
    <input type="range" id="pipVol" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="1" style="width:60px">
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     VIRTUAL REMOTE
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="vrWrap" class="hidden">
  <div class="vr-header">
    <span>📱 Sanal Kumanda</span>
    <button class="icon-btn" id="vrClose">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="vr-display" id="vrChDisplay">—</div>
  <!-- D-Pad -->
  <div class="vr-dpad">
    <div></div>
    <button data-vk="up">▲</button>
    <div></div>
    <button data-vk="left">◀</button>
    <button data-vk="ok" class="vr-center">OK</button>
    <button data-vk="right">▶</button>
    <div></div>
    <button data-vk="down">▼</button>
    <div></div>
  </div>
  <!-- Vol / Ch -->
  <div class="vr-row">
    <button data-vk="vol_dn">🔉</button>
    <button data-vk="mute">🔇</button>
    <button data-vk="vol_up">🔊</button>
  </div>
  <div class="vr-row">
    <button data-vk="ch_dn">CH-</button>
    <button data-vk="prev_ch">↩</button>
    <button data-vk="ch_up">CH+</button>
  </div>
  <!-- Functions -->
  <div class="vr-row">
    <button data-vk="menu">☰</button>
    <button data-vk="info">ℹ️</button>
    <button data-vk="epg">📅</button>
    <button data-vk="fav">⭐</button>
  </div>
  <div class="vr-row">
    <button data-vk="play">▶</button>
    <button data-vk="rec">⏺</button>
    <button data-vk="rew">⏪</button>
    <button data-vk="fwd">⏩</button>
  </div>
  <!-- Numpad -->
  <div class="vr-numpad">
    <button class="vr-num" data-vk="1">1</button>
    <button class="vr-num" data-vk="2">2</button>
    <button class="vr-num" data-vk="3">3</button>
    <button class="vr-num" data-vk="4">4</button>
    <button class="vr-num" data-vk="5">5</button>
    <button class="vr-num" data-vk="6">6</button>
    <button class="vr-num" data-vk="7">7</button>
    <button class="vr-num" data-vk="8">8</button>
    <button class="vr-num" data-vk="9">9</button>
    <button class="vr-num" data-vk="backspace">⌫</button>
    <button class="vr-num" data-vk="0">0</button>
    <button data-vk="power">⏻</button>
  </div>
  <!-- Color buttons -->
  <div class="vr-color-row">
    <button class="vr-red" data-vk="col_red" title="Canlı"></button>
    <button class="vr-green" data-vk="col_green" title="EPG"></button>
    <button class="vr-yellow" data-vk="col_yellow" title="Favori"></button>
    <button class="vr-blue" data-vk="col_blue" title="Ayarlar"></button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     BOTTOM NAV (Mobile)
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<nav class="bottom-nav">
  <div class="bn-item active" data-page="live"><span class="bn-item-icon">📡</span><span>Canlı</span></div>
  <div class="bn-item" data-page="movies"><span class="bn-item-icon">🎬</span><span>Film</span></div>
  <div class="bn-item" data-page="epg"><span class="bn-item-icon">📅</span><span>EPG</span></div>
  <div class="bn-item" data-page="favorites"><span class="bn-item-icon">⭐</span><span>Favori</span></div>
  <div class="bn-item" data-page="settings"><span class="bn-item-icon">⚙️</span><span>Ayar</span></div>
</nav>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PWA BANNER
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="pwaBanner" class="hidden">
  <div class="pwa-text">📲 <strong>StreamVault Pro</strong> uygulamasını cihazına yükle!</div>
  <div class="pwa-actions">
    <button class="btn btn-sm" id="pwaInstallBtn">Yükle</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="pwaDismiss">Sonra</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Hidden canvas for screenshots -->
<canvas id="screenshotCanvas" style="display:none"></canvas>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     HLS.JS LIBRARY
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/hls.js@latest"></script>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     MAIN APPLICATION JS
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<script>
/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
   StreamVault Pro v4.2.0 — Main JavaScript
   Copyright © 2025 StreamVault Pro
   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
;(function(){
'use strict';

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// GLOBAL CONSTANTS & UTILITIES
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

const C = console;
const $  = (s,p) => (p||document).querySelector(s);
const $$ = (s,p) => [...(p||document).querySelectorAll(s)];
const wait = ms => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms));
const noop = ()=>{};

function uuid(){return crypto.randomUUID ? crypto.randomUUID()
  : 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g,c=>{
    const r=Math.random()*16|0;return(c==='x'?r:(r&0x3|0x8)).toString(16)})}
function clamp(v,lo,hi){return Math.max(lo,Math.min(hi,v))}
function fmtDur(s){if(!s&&s!==0)return'--:--';s=Math.floor(s);
  const h=Math.floor(s/3600),m=Math.floor(s%3600/60),sec=s%60;
  return h>0?`${h}:${String(m).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(sec).padStart(2,'0')}`
    :`${m}:${String(sec).padStart(2,'0')}`}
function fmtDate(d){return new Date(d).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR',
  {weekday:'short',day:'numeric',month:'short',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}
function fmtBytes(b){if(!b)return'0 B';const k=1024,s=['B','KB','MB','GB','TB'];
  const i=Math.floor(Math.log(b)/Math.log(k));return+(b/Math.pow(k,i)).toFixed(1)+' '+s[i]}
function debounce(fn,ms=300){let t;return(...a)=>{clearTimeout(t);t=setTimeout(()=>fn(...a),ms)}}
function throttle(fn,ms=16){let last=0;return(...a)=>{const now=Date.now();
  if(now-last>=ms){last=now;fn(...a)}}}
function rand(a,b){return Math.floor(Math.random()*(b-a+1))+a}
function shuffle(arr){for(let i=arr.length-1;i>0;i--){const j=rand(0,i);
  [arr[i],arr[j]]=[arr[j],arr[i]]}return arr}
function strSimilarity(a,b){a=a.toLowerCase();b=b.toLowerCase();
  if(a===b)return 1;if(a.includes(b)||b.includes(a))return 0.8;
  let m=0;const ml=Math.min(a.length,b.length);
  for(let i=0;i<ml;i++)if(a[i]===b[i])m++;return m/Math.max(a.length,b.length)}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// APP STATE
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

const App = {
  version: '4.2.0',
  currentPage: 'live',
  sidebarOpen: true,
  channels: [],
  groups: [],
  selectedCh: null,
  playingCh: null,
  lastCh: null,
  favorites: new Set(),
  dvrTimers: [],
  dvrRecordings: [],
  playlists: [],
  sources: [],
  watchHistory: [],
  aiRecommendations: [],
  castSession: null,
  wpRoom: null,
  wpUsername: '',
  notifications: [],
  settings: {
    theme:'dark',lang:'tr',animations:true,siderbarCompact:false,tz:'auto',
    autoplay:true,autoQuality:true,defVolume:1,hlsEngine:'hls',lowLatency:false,
    notifProg:true,notifDvr:true,notifSound:true,saveHistory:true,analytics:false
  },
  player: null,
  hls: null,
  audioCtx: null,
  spectrumAnim: null,
  bitrates: [],
  bwHistory: [],
  startTime: Date.now()
};

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// LOCAL STORAGE
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

const Store = {
  get(k,def=null){
    try{const v=localStorage.getItem('svp_'+k);return v?JSON.parse(v):def}catch(e){return def}
  },
  set(k,v){
    try{localStorage.setItem('svp_'+k,JSON.stringify(v))}catch(e){C.warn('Storage full')}
  },
  del(k){localStorage.removeItem('svp_'+k)},
  clear(){Object.keys(localStorage).filter(k=>k.startsWith('svp_')).forEach(k=>localStorage.removeItem(k))}
};

function loadState(){
  App.favorites=new Set(Store.get('favorites',[]));
  App.channels=Store.get('channels',[]);
  App.dvrTimers=Store.get('dvrTimers',[]);
  App.dvrRecordings=Store.get('dvrRec',[]);
  App.playlists=Store.get('playlists',[]);
  App.sources=Store.get('sources',[]);
  App.watchHistory=Store.get('history',[]);
  App.settings={...App.settings,...Store.get('settings',{})};
  App.wpUsername=Store.get('wpUsername','User_'+rand(1000,9999));
  applySettings();
}
function saveState(){
  Store.set('favorites',[...App.favorites]);
  Store.set('channels',App.channels);
  Store.set('dvrTimers',App.dvrTimers);
  Store.set('dvrRec',App.dvrRecordings);
  Store.set('playlists',App.playlists);
  Store.set('sources',App.sources);
  Store.set('history',App.watchHistory.slice(0,200));
  Store.set('settings',App.settings);
  Store.set('wpUsername',App.wpUsername);
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// TOAST SYSTEM
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

const Toast = {
  show(msg, type='info', duration=3500){
    const t=document.createElement('div');
    t.className=`toast toast-${type}`;
    t.innerHTML=`<span class="toast-icon">${{success:'✅',error:'❌',warning:'⚠️',info:'ℹ️'}[type]||'ℹ️'}
      </span><span class="toast-msg">${msg}</span>`;
    $('#toastStack').appendChild(t);
    requestAnimationFrame(()=>t.classList.add('toast-show'));
    setTimeout(()=>{t.classList.remove('toast-show');
      t.addEventListener('transitionend',()=>t.remove())},duration);
    if(App.settings.notifSound && type!=='info') playBeep(type==='error'?200:440,0.1);
  },
  success(m){this.show(m,'success')},
  error(m){this.show(m,'error')},
  warn(m){this.show(m,'warning')},
  info(m){this.show(m,'info')}
};

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// BEEP SOUND
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function playBeep(freq=440,dur=0.08){
  try{
    const ctx=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
    const osc=ctx.createOscillator();const gain=ctx.createGain();
    osc.type='sine';osc.frequency.value=freq;
    gain.gain.value=0.15;gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,ctx.currentTime+dur);
    osc.connect(gain);gain.connect(ctx.destination);
    osc.start();osc.stop(ctx.currentTime+dur);
  }catch(e){}
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// MODAL SYSTEM
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

const Modal = {
  _active:null,
  open(id){
    const el=$('#modal-'+id);if(!el)return;
    if(this._active) this.close();
    el.classList.remove('hidden');
    el.classList.add('modal-active');
    this._active=id;
    document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
  },
  close(){
    if(!this._active)return;
    const el=$('#modal-'+this._active);
    if(el){el.classList.remove('modal-active');el.classList.add('hidden')}
    this._active=null;
    document.body.style.overflow='';
  },
  confirm(msg,title='Onayla'){
    return new Promise(resolve=>{
      $('#confirmTitle').textContent=title;
      $('#confirmMsg').textContent=msg;
      $('#confirmOk').onclick=()=>{Modal.close();resolve(true)};
      $$('.modal-close','#modal-confirm').forEach(b=>b.onclick=()=>{Modal.close();resolve(false)});
      Modal.open('confirm');
    });
  }
};

document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
  if(e.target.closest('.modal-close')){Modal.close();return}
  if(e.target.classList.contains('modal-backdrop')){Modal.close();return}
});

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// SPLASH SCREEN
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

async function showSplash(){
  const splash=$('#splash');
  const bar=$('#splashBar');
  const status=$('#splashStatus');

  const canvas=$('#splashCanvas');
  if(canvas){
    const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
    canvas.width=window.innerWidth;canvas.height=window.innerHeight;
    const particles=[];
    for(let i=0;i<60;i++){
      particles.push({x:rand(0,canvas.width),y:rand(0,canvas.height),
        r:rand(1,3),dx:(Math.random()-.5)*.4,dy:(Math.random()-.5)*.4,
        a:Math.random()*.4+.1});
    }
    App._splashAnim=true;
    (function animSplash(){
      if(!App._splashAnim)return;
      ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
      particles.forEach(p=>{
        p.x+=p.dx;p.y+=p.dy;
        if(p.x<0)p.x=canvas.width;if(p.x>canvas.width)p.x=0;
        if(p.y<0)p.y=canvas.height;if(p.y>canvas.height)p.y=0;
        ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);
        ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(124,58,237,${p.a})`;ctx.fill();
      });
      requestAnimationFrame(animSplash);
    })();
  }

  const steps=[
    {msg:'Bileşenler yükleniyor…',pct:15},
    {msg:'Thema yapılandırılıyor…',pct:30},
    {msg:'Kaynaklar kontrol ediliyor…',pct:45},
    {msg:'HLS motoru başlatılıyor…',pct:60},
    {msg:'UI bileşenleri hazırlanıyor…',pct:75},
    {msg:'Kaynak veriler yükleniyor…',pct:88},
    {msg:'Hazır! 🎬',pct:100}
  ];

  for(const s of steps){
    status.textContent=s.msg;
    bar.style.width=s.pct+'%';
    await wait(180+rand(0,200));
  }

  App._splashAnim=false;
  await wait(300);
  splash.style.opacity='0';splash.style.transition='opacity .5s';
  await wait(550);
  splash.style.display='none';
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// THEME & SETTINGS
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function applySettings(){
  document.body.dataset.theme=App.settings.theme;
  if(App.settings.siderbarCompact) $('#app').classList.add('sb-compact');
  else $('#app').classList.remove('sb-compact');

  const s=App.settings;
  const setVal=(id,v)=>{
    const el=$('#'+id);
    if(!el)return;
    if(el.type==='checkbox')el.checked=v;
    else el.value=v;
  };
  setVal('setTheme',s.theme);setVal('setLang',s.lang);
  setVal('setAutoplay',s.autoplay);setVal('setAutoQuality',s.autoQuality);
  setVal('setDefVol',s.defVolume);setVal('setHlsEngine',s.hlsEngine);
  setVal('setLowLatency',s.lowLatency);setVal('setAnimations',s.animations);
  setVal('setSidebarCompact',s.siderbarCompact);setVal('setTZ',s.tz);
  setVal('setNotifProg',s.notifProg);setVal('setNotifDvr',s.notifDvr);
  setVal('setNotifSound',s.notifSound);setVal('setHistory',s.saveHistory);
  setVal('setAnalytics',s.analytics);

  const volEl=$('#setDefVolVal');
  if(volEl) volEl.textContent=Math.round(s.defVolume*100)+'%';

  const bd=$('#setBuildDate');
  if(bd) bd.textContent=BuildDate;
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--anim-speed',s.animations?'1':'0');
}

function setupSettings(){
  const themeEl=$('#setTheme');
  if(themeEl) themeEl.onchange=function(){
    App.settings.theme=this.value;
    document.body.dataset.theme=this.value;
    applySettings();saveState();
    Toast.success('Tema değiştirildi: '+this.options[this.selectedIndex].text);
  };

  const dv=$('#setDefVol');
  if(dv){
    dv.oninput=function(){
      App.settings.defVolume=+this.value;
      const val=$('#setDefVolVal');
      if(val) val.textContent=Math.round(+this.value*100)+'%';
    };
    dv.onchange=function(){saveState()};
  }

  ['setAutoplay','setAutoQuality','setLowLatency','setAnimations',
   'setSidebarCompact','setNotifProg','setNotifDvr','setNotifSound',
   'setHistory','setAnalytics'].forEach(id=>{
    const el=$('#'+id);
    if(!el)return;
    el.onchange=function(){
      const key=id.replace('set','').charAt(0).toLowerCase()+id.slice(4);
      App.settings[key]=this.checked;
      if(id==='setSidebarCompact'){
        if(this.checked)$('#app').classList.add('sb-compact');
        else $('#app').classList.remove('sb-compact');
      }
      saveState();
    };
  });

  const he=$('#setHlsEngine');
  if(he) he.onchange=function(){App.settings.hlsEngine=this.value;saveState()};

  const sk=$('#setShowKeys');
  if(sk) sk.onclick=()=>showKeyShortcuts();

  const nd=$('#setNukeData');
  if(nd) nd.onclick=async()=>{
    if(await Modal.confirm('Tüm yerel veriler silinecek. Emin misin?','⚠️ Veri Silme')){
      Store.clear();location.reload();
    }
  };

  const cu=$('#setCheckUpdate');
  if(cu) cu.onclick=()=>Toast.info('Son sürümü kullanıyorsunuz ✅');
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// CLOCK
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function startClock(){
  const el=$('#tbClock');if(!el)return;
  const fmt=()=>{
    const d=new Date();
    el.textContent=d.toLocaleTimeString('tr-TR',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit'});
  };
  fmt();setInterval(fmt,1000);
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// NAVIGATION
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function navigate(page){
  $$('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
  const target=$('#page-'+page);
  if(target){target.classList.add('active')}
  else{
    const alias={ai_rec:'ai_rec',ai_search:'ai_rec',ai_sum:'ai_rec'};
    const resolved=alias[page]||page;
    const t2=$('#page-'+resolved);
    if(t2)t2.classList.add('active');
  }

  $$('.sb-item').forEach(i=>{
    i.classList.toggle('active',i.dataset.page===page||
      (page.startsWith('ai_')&&i.dataset.page==='ai_rec'));
  });

  $$('.bn-item').forEach(i=>i.classList.toggle('active',i.dataset.page===page));

  const names={live:'Canlı TV',movies:'Filmler',series:'Diziler',epg:'EPG',
    favorites:'Favoriler',dvr:'DVR / Kayıtlar',playlist:'Playlist Editör',
    catchup:'Catch-Up TV',stats:'İstatistikler',settings:'Ayarlar',
    directory:'IPTV Dizin',cast:'Yayın Yap',watchparty:'Watch Party',
    ai_rec:'AI Öneriler',ai_search:'AI Arama',ai_sum:'AI Özet'};
  const bc=$('#tbBcCurrent');if(bc) bc.textContent=names[page]||page;

  App.currentPage=page;

  if(page==='stats') renderStats();
  if(page==='playlist') renderPlaylistEditor();
  if(page==='dvr') renderDVR();
  if(page==='epg') renderEPGPage();
  if(page==='ai_rec') renderAIRecommendations();
  if(page==='directory') renderDirectory();
  if(page==='movies') renderMovies();
  if(page==='series') renderSeries();
  if(page==='favorites') renderFavorites();
  if(page==='catchup') renderCatchup();

  const sb=$('#sidebar');
  if(sb) sb.classList.remove('sidebar-open');
  const mo=$('#mobOverlay');
  if(mo) mo.classList.remove('show');
}

function setupNav(){
  $$('.sb-item, .bn-item').forEach(el=>{
    el.addEventListener('click',e=>{
      e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();
      const p=el.dataset.page;
      if(p) navigate(p);
    });
  });

  $$('.sb-group-hdr').forEach(h=>{
    h.addEventListener('click',()=>{
      const g=h.dataset.group;
      const sub=$('#sbSub'+g.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+g.slice(1));
      if(sub){sub.classList.toggle('sb-sub-open');const ch=h.querySelector('.sb-chevron');if(ch)ch.classList.toggle('open')}
    });
  });

  const st=$('#sidebarToggle');
  if(st) st.onclick=()=>{
    App.sidebarOpen=!App.sidebarOpen;
    const sb=$('#sidebar');
    if(window.innerWidth<960){
      sb.classList.toggle('sidebar-open');
      const mo=$('#mobOverlay');if(mo) mo.classList.toggle('show');
    }else{
      sb.classList.toggle('collapsed');
    }
  };
  const mb=$('#mobMenuBtn');
  if(mb) mb.onclick=()=>{
    const sb=$('#sidebar');sb.classList.toggle('sidebar-open');
    const mo=$('#mobOverlay');if(mo) mo.classList.toggle('show');
  };
  const mo=$('#mobOverlay');
  if(mo) mo.onclick=()=>{
    const sb=$('#sidebar');sb.classList.remove('sidebar-open');
    mo.classList.remove('show');
  };

  document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    const tab=e.target.closest('.tab-item');
    if(!tab)return;
    const parent=tab.parentElement;
    parent.querySelectorAll('.tab-item').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
    tab.classList.add('active');

    const panel=tab.dataset.panel;
    if(panel){
      const container=parent.parentElement;
      if(container){
        container.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
        const tp=container.querySelector('#panel-'+panel);
        if(tp)tp.classList.add('active');
      }
    }

    const dvr=tab.dataset.dvr;
    if(dvr) renderDVRTab(dvr);
  });
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// FULLSCREEN
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function toggleFullscreen(){
  if(!document.fullscreenElement){
    document.documentElement.requestFullscreen().catch(()=>{});
    Toast.info('Tam ekran moduna geçildi');
  }else{
    document.exitFullscreen();
    Toast.info('Tam ekrandan çıkıldı');
  }
}
const pcf=$('#pcFullscreen');if(pcf) pcf.onclick=toggleFullscreen;
const tbf=$('#tbFullBtn');if(tbf) tbf.onclick=toggleFullscreen;

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// HLS PLAYER
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function initPlayer(){
  App.player=$('#mainVideo');
  if(!App.player)return;
  App.player.volume=App.settings.defVolume;
  const pv=$('#pcVol');if(pv) pv.value=App.settings.defVolume;
  updateVolumeUI();
}

function loadStream(url, name=''){
  const v=App.player;
  if(!v)return;

  showLoader('Bağlanıyor…');
  hideError();
  const idle=$('#vidIdle');if(idle) idle.classList.add('hidden');

  if(App.hls){App.hls.destroy();App.hls=null}

  if(v.canPlayType('application/vnd.apple.mpegurl')){
    v.src=url;
    v.addEventListener('loadedmetadata',onVideoLoaded,{once:true});
    v.addEventListener('error',()=>onVideoError(url),{once:true});
    return;
  }

  if(window.Hls){
    if(Hls.isSupported()){
      const hls=new Hls({
        enableWorker:true,
        lowLatencyMode:App.settings.lowLatency,
        maxBufferLength:App.settings.autoQuality?30:60,
        maxMaxBufferLength:300,
        startLevel:-1,
        maxLoadingDelay:4,
        fragLoadingTimeOut:20000,
        manifestLoadingTimeOut:10000,
        levelLoadingTimeOut:10000
      });
      App.hls=hls;
      hls.loadSource(url);
      hls.attachMedia(v);

      hls.on(Hls.Events.MANIFEST_PARSED,(e,data)=>{
        C.log('[HLS] Manifest loaded:',data.levels.length,'quality levels');
        onVideoLoaded();
      });
      hls.on(Hls.Events.ERROR,(e,data)=>{
        if(data.fatal){
          switch(data.type){
            case Hls.ErrorTypes.NETWORK_ERROR:
              C.warn('[HLS] Network error, trying to recover');
              hls.startLoad();break;
            case Hls.ErrorTypes.MEDIA_ERROR:
              C.warn('[HLS] Media error, recovering');
              hls.recoverMediaError();break;
            default:
              onVideoError(url);hls.destroy();break;
          }
        }
      });
      hls.on(Hls.Events.LEVEL_SWITCHED,(e,data)=>{
        const lvl=hls.levels[data.level];
        if(lvl) C.log('[HLS] Quality:',lvl.height+'p @'+(lvl.bitrate/1e6).toFixed(1)+'Mbps');
      });

      hls.on(Hls.Events.FRAG_LOADED,(e,data)=>{
        if(data.frag){
          const t=data.frag.loadEnd-data.frag.loadStart;
          const bw=data.stats.total?(data.stats.total*8)/((data.stats.totalTime||1)*1000):0;
          updateBandwidth(bw);
        }
      });

    } else {
      Toast.error('HLS desteklenmiyor! Farklı bir tarayıcı deneyin.');
    }
  } else {
    Toast.error('HLS kütüphanesi yüklenmedi!');
  }
}

function onVideoLoaded(){
  hideLoader();
  App.player.play().catch(()=>{});
  updateQualityBars();
  startSpectrum();
  Toast.success('Akış bağlandı ✓');
}

function onVideoError(url){
  hideLoader();
  showError('Akış yüklenemedi','URL: '+url);
  Toast.error('Oynatma hatası!');
}

function showLoader(msg='Bağlanıyor…'){
  const el=$('#vidLoader');
  if(el){el.classList.remove('hidden');const t=$('#vidLoaderText');if(t)t.textContent=msg}
}
function hideLoader(){const el=$('#vidLoader');if(el) el.classList.add('hidden')}
function showError(msg,sub=''){
  const el=$('#vidError');
  if(el){el.classList.remove('hidden');
    const m=$('#vidErrMsg');if(m) m.textContent=msg;
    const s=$('#vidErrSub');if(s) s.textContent=sub}
}
function hideError(){const el=$('#vidError');if(el) el.classList.add('hidden')}

const rb=$('#retryBtn');if(rb) rb.onclick=()=>{
  if(App.playingCh) loadStream(App.playingCh.url, App.playingCh.name);
};

const ab=$('#altStreamBtn');if(ab) ab.onclick=()=>{
  Toast.info('Alternatif akış deneniyor…');
  if(App.playingCh){
    const alt=App.playingCh.url.replace(/(\.[a-z0-9]+)(\?.*)?$/i,'_alt$1\$2');
    loadStream(alt,App.playingCh.name+' (Alt)');
  }
};

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// PLAYER CONTROLS
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function setupPlayerControls(){
  const v=App.player;if(!v)return;

  const pcPlay=$('#pcPlay');
  if(pcPlay) pcPlay.onclick=()=>togglePlayPause();

  function togglePlayPause(){
    if(v.paused){v.play().catch(()=>{});if(pcPlay)pcPlay.textContent='⏸';showOsd('▶ Oynat')}
    else{v.pause();if(pcPlay)pcPlay.textContent='▶';showOsd('⏸ Duraklat')}
  }

  const pcPrev=$('#pcPrev');if(pcPrev) pcPrev.onclick=()=>switchChannel(-1);
  const pcNext=$('#pcNext');if(pcNext) pcNext.onclick=()=>switchChannel(1);

  const pcMute=$('#pcMute');if(pcMute) pcMute.onclick=()=>{v.muted=!v.muted;updateVolumeUI()};

  const pcVol=$('#pcVol');if(pcVol) pcVol.oninput=function(){v.volume=+this.value;v.muted=false;updateVolumeUI()};

  const progWrap=$('#pcProgBar');
  if(progWrap){
    progWrap.addEventListener('click',e=>{
      if(v.duration&&isFinite(v.duration)){
        const rect=progWrap.getBoundingClientRect();
        const pct=(e.clientX-rect.left)/rect.width;
        v.currentTime=pct*v.duration;
      }
    });
  }

  const speeds=[0.25,0.5,0.75,1,1.25,1.5,1.75,2];
  let speedIdx=3;
  const pcSpeed=$('#pcSpeedBtn');
  if(pcSpeed) pcSpeed.onclick=()=>{
    speedIdx=(speedIdx+1)%speeds.length;
    v.playbackRate=speeds[speedIdx];
    pcSpeed.textContent=speeds[speedIdx]+'×';
    showOsd('Hız: '+speeds[speedIdx]+'×');
  };

  const pcPip=$('#pcPipBtn');
  if(pcPip) pcPip.onclick=async()=>{
    try{
      if(document.pictureInPictureElement) await document.exitPictureInPicture();
      else await v.requestPictureInPicture();
    }catch(e){Toast.error('PiP desteklenmiyor')}
  };

  const pcMini=$('#pcMiniBtn');if(pcMini) pcMini.onclick=()=>activateMiniPlayer();

  const pcZoom=$('#pcZoomBtn');
  if(pcZoom) pcZoom.onclick=()=>{
    v.style.objectFit=v.style.objectFit==='cover'?'contain':'cover';
    showOsd('Zoom: '+(v.style.objectFit==='cover'?'Doldur':'Sığdır'));
  };

  const pcCinema=$('#pcCinemaBtn');
  if(pcCinema) pcCinema.onclick=()=>{
    $('#app').classList.toggle('cinema-mode');
    const active=$('#app').classList.contains('cinema-mode');
    showOsd('Sinema Modu: '+(active?'Açık':'Kapalı'));
  };

  const pcRec=$('#pcRecBtn');
  if(pcRec) pcRec.onclick=()=>{
    if(App.playingCh){
      addDVRTimer(App.playingCh);
      showOsd('⏺ Kayıt zamanlayıcı eklendi');
    }
  };

  const pcSettings=$('#pcSettingsBtn');
  if(pcSettings) pcSettings.onclick=()=>{
    const ps=$('#playerSettings');if(ps) ps.classList.toggle('hidden');
  };
  const psClose=$('#psClose');
  if(psClose) psClose.onclick=()=>{
    const ps=$('#playerSettings');if(ps) ps.classList.add('hidden');
  };

  const pcSub=$('#pcSubBtn');
  if(pcSub) pcSub.onclick=()=>{
    const tracks=v.textTracks;
    if(tracks.length===0){Toast.info('Altyazı bulunamadı');return}
    for(let i=0;i<tracks.length;i++){
      if(tracks[i].mode==='showing'){tracks[i].mode='hidden';Toast.info('Altyazı kapatıldı');return}
      tracks[i].mode='showing';
    }
    Toast.success('Altyazı açıldı');
  };

  const pcAudio=$('#pcAudioBtn');
  if(pcAudio) pcAudio.onclick=()=>{
    if(!App.hls)return Toast.info('HLS gerekli');
    const audios=App.hls.audioTracks;
    if(!audios||audios.length<2){Toast.info('Tek ses kanalı');return}
    let ci=App.hls.audioTrack||0;
    ci=(ci+1)%audios.length;
    App.hls.audioTrack=ci;
    Toast.success('Ses: '+(audios[ci].name||audios[ci].lang||'Track '+(ci+1)));
  };

  setupPlayerSettings();
}

function updateVolumeUI(){
  const v=App.player;if(!v)return;
  const vol=v.muted?0:v.volume;
  const pv=$('#pcVol');if(pv) pv.value=v.muted?0:v.volume;
  const icon=vol===0?'🔇':vol<0.33?'🔈':vol<0.66?'🔉':'🔊';
  const pm=$('#pcMute');if(pm) pm.textContent=icon;
}

function setupPlayerSettings(){
  const sliders=['psBrightness','psContrast','psSaturation','psSharpness','psBoost'];
  const valIds=['psBrightnessVal','psContrastVal','psSaturationVal','psSharpnessVal','psBoostVal'];

  sliders.forEach((id,i)=>{
    const el=$('#'+id);if(!el)return;
    el.oninput=()=>{
      const v=+el.value;
      const valEl=$('#'+valIds[i]);
      if(valEl){
        if(id==='psBoost') valEl.textContent=v+'×';
        else valEl.textContent=Math.round(v*100)+'%';
      }
      applyVideoFilters();
    };
  });

  const pad=$('#psAudioDelay');
  if(pad) pad.oninput=function(){
    const v=$('#psAudioDelayVal');if(v) v.textContent=this.value+'ms';
    if(App.player) App.player.audioDelay=+this.value/1000;
  };
  const ss=$('#psSubSize');
  if(ss) ss.oninput=function(){const v=$('#psSubSizeVal');if(v) v.textContent=this.value+'px'};
  const sd=$('#psSubDelay');
  if(sd) sd.oninput=function(){const v=$('#psSubDelayVal');if(v) v.textContent=this.value+'ms'};

  const psReset=$('#psReset');
  if(psReset) psReset.onclick=()=>{
    const set=(id,v)=>{const e=$('#'+id);if(e)e.value=v};
    set('psBrightness',1);const bv=$('#psBrightnessVal');if(bv)bv.textContent='100%';
    set('psContrast',1);const cv=$('#psContrastVal');if(cv)cv.textContent='100%';
    set('psSaturation',1);const sv=$('#psSaturationVal');if(sv)sv.textContent='100%';
    set('psSharpness',0);const shv=$('#psSharpnessVal');if(shv)shv.textContent='0';
    set('psBoost',1);const bsv=$('#psBoostVal');if(bsv)bsv.textContent='1×';
    set('psAudioDelay',0);const adv=$('#psAudioDelayVal');if(adv)adv.textContent='0ms';
    applyVideoFilters();
    Toast.info('Varsayılana sıfırlandı');
  };
}

function applyVideoFilters(){
  const v=App.player;if(!v)return;
  const b=+($('#psBrightness')?.value)||1;
  const c=+($('#psContrast')?.value)||1;
  const s=+($('#psSaturation')?.value)||1;
  v.style.filter=`brightness(${b}) contrast(${c}) saturate(${s})`;
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// CHANNEL SWITCHING
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function switchChannel(dir=0){
  const list=getFilteredChannels();
  if(!list.length)return;
  let idx=list.findIndex(c=>c.id===(App.selectedCh?.id));
  if(idx<0)idx=0;
  idx=(idx+dir+list.length)%list.length;
  selectChannel(list[idx]);
}

function selectChannel(ch){
  App.lastCh=App.playingCh;
  App.selectedCh=ch;
  App.playingCh=ch;

  showChOsd(ch);
  updatePCInfo(ch);
  updateEPGStrip(ch);

  loadStream(ch.url, ch.name);

  $$('.ch-item').forEach(el=>{
    el.classList.toggle('selected',el.dataset.id==ch.id);
  });

  const item=$(`.ch-item[data-id="${ch.id}"]`);
  if(item) item.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'nearest'});

  if(App.settings.saveHistory){
    App.watchHistory.unshift({ch_id:ch.id,name:ch.name,ts:Date.now()});
    App.watchHistory=App.watchHistory.slice(0,200);
    Store.set('history',App.watchHistory);
  }
}

function showChOsd(ch){
  const osd=$('#chOsd');if(!osd)return;
  const cn=$('#chOsdNum');if(cn) cn.textContent=ch.number||'—';
  const nn=$('#chOsdName');if(nn) nn.textContent=ch.name;
  const cl=$('#chOsdLogo');if(cl) cl.textContent=ch.logo?'':'📺';
  osd.classList.remove('hidden');
  clearTimeout(App._osdTimer);
  App._osdTimer=setTimeout(()=>osd.classList.add('hidden'),3500);
}

function updatePCInfo(ch){
  const pcn=$('#pcChName');if(pcn) pcn.textContent=ch.name;
  const mpn=$('#mpChName');if(mpn) mpn.textContent=ch.name;
}

function showOsd(text){
  const osd=$('#osdOverlay');if(!osd)return;
  const ot=$('#osdText');if(ot) ot.textContent=text;
  osd.classList.remove('hidden');
  clearTimeout(App._osdTimer2);
  App._osdTimer2=setTimeout(()=>osd.classList.add('hidden'),1500);
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// MINI PLAYER
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function activateMiniPlayer(){
  const mp=$('#miniPlayer');if(!mp)return;
  mp.classList.remove('hidden');
  const mpn=$('#mpChName');if(mpn) mpn.textContent=App.playingCh?.name||'—';
  const mpVid=$('#mpThumbVideo');
  if(mpVid&&App.playingCh) mpVid.src=App.playingCh.url;
}

const mpExp=$('#mpExpand');if(mpExp) mpExp.onclick=()=>{
  const mp=$('#miniPlayer');if(mp) mp.classList.add('hidden');
  navigate('live');
};
const mpClose=$('#mpClose');if(mpClose) mpClose.onclick=()=>{
  const mp=$('#miniPlayer');if(mp) mp.classList.add('hidden');
  if(App.player){App.player.pause();App.player.src=''}
  hideLoader();
};
const mpPlay=$('#mpPlayBtn');if(mpPlay) mpPlay.onclick=()=>{
  if(App.player){
    if(App.player.paused){App.player.play().catch(()=>{});mpPlay.textContent='⏸'}
    else{App.player.pause();mpPlay.textContent='▶'}
  }
};

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// PIP WINDOW
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function activatePIP(){
  const pip=$('#pipWin');if(!pip)return;
  pip.classList.remove('hidden');
  const pcn=$('#pipChName');if(pcn) pcn.textContent=App.playingCh?.name||'—';
  const pv=$('#pipVideo');
  if(pv&&App.playingCh) pv.src=App.playingCh.url;
}

(function(){
  const pip=$('#pipWin');if(pip){
    let drag=false,sx,sy,ox,oy;
    const bar=$('#pipTitleBar');

    if(bar){
      bar.onmousedown=e=>{
        drag=true;sx=e.clientX;sy=e.clientY;
        const r=pip.getBoundingClientRect();ox=r.left;oy=r.top;
        e.preventDefault();
      };
      document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{
        if(!drag)return;
        pip.style.left=(ox+e.clientX-sx)+'px';
        pip.style.top=(oy+e.clientY-sy)+'px';
      });
      document.addEventListener('mouseup',()=>{drag=false});
    }

    const pcb=$('#pipCloseBtn');if(pcb) pcb.onclick=()=>pip.classList.add('hidden');
    const pfb=$('#pipFullBtn');if(pfb) pfb.onclick=()=>{pip.classList.add('hidden');navigate('live')};

    const ppb=$('#pipPlayBtn');if(ppb) ppb.onclick=()=>{
      const pv=$('#pipVideo');
      if(pv){if(pv.paused){pv.play().catch(()=>{});ppb.textContent='⏸'}
      else{pv.pause();ppb.textContent='▶'}}
    };
    const pmb=$('#pipMuteBtn');if(pmb) pmb.onclick=()=>{
      const pv=$('#pipVideo');if(pv){pv.muted=!pv.muted;pmb.textContent=pv.muted?'🔇':'🔊'}
    };
    const pvol=$('#pipVol');if(pvol) pvol.oninput=function(){
      const pv=$('#pipVideo');if(pv){pv.volume=+this.value;pv.muted=false}
      if(pmb) pmb.textContent=+this.value===0?'🔇':'🔊';
    };

    const handle=$('#pipResize');
    if(handle){
      let rsz=false,rsx,rsy,rw,rh;
      handle.onmousedown=e=>{
        rsz=true;rsx=e.clientX;rsy=e.clientY;
        rw=pip.offsetWidth;rh=pip.offsetHeight;e.preventDefault();
      };
      document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{
        if(!rsz)return;
        pip.style.width=Math.max(200,rw+(e.clientX-rsx))+'px';
        pip.style.height=Math.max(150,rh+(e.clientY-rsy))+'px';
      });
      document.addEventListener('mouseup',()=>{rsz=false});
    }
  }
})();

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// CHANNEL LIST RENDERING
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function buildChannelGroups(){
  const groups={};
  App.channels.forEach(ch=>{
    const g=ch.group||'Diğer';
    if(!groups[g])groups[g]=[];
    groups[g].push(ch);
  });
  App.groups=Object.entries(groups).map(([name,channels])=>({name,count:channels.length,channels}));
  return App.groups;
}

function getFilteredChannels(){
  const search=($('#chSearch')?.value||'').toLowerCase();
  const filter=($('.ch-filter-btn.active')?.dataset.filter)||'all';
  const sort=$('#chSort')?.value||'default';
  const activeCat=$('.cat-tab.active')?.dataset.cat||'all';

  let list=[...App.channels];

  if(activeCat!=='all') list=list.filter(c=>c.group===activeCat);

  if(search) list=list.filter(c=>
    c.name.toLowerCase().includes(search)||
    (c.group||'').toLowerCase().includes(search)||
    String(c.number||'').includes(search)
  );

  if(filter==='fav') list=list.filter(c=>App.favorites.has(c.id));
  if(filter==='hd') list=list.filter(c=>c.quality==='HD'||c.quality==='FHD'||c.quality==='4K');
  if(filter==='4k') list=list.filter(c=>c.quality==='4K');
  if(filter==='online') list=list.filter(c=>c.online!==false);

  if(sort==='alpha') list.sort((a,b)=>a.name.localeCompare(b.name,'tr'));
  if(sort==='alpha_rev') list.sort((a,b)=>b.name.localeCompare(a.name,'tr'));
  if(sort==='quality') list.sort((a,b)=>{
    const q={4K:3,FHD:2,HD:1,SD:0};return (q[b.quality]||0)-(q[a.quality]||0)});
  if(sort==='status') list.sort((a,b)=>(b.online===false?0:1)-(a.online===false?0:1));

  return list;
}

function renderChannelList(){
  const list=getFilteredChannels();
  const container=$('#chList');if(!container)return;

  if(!list.length){
    container.innerHTML=`<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">📡</div>
      <div class="empty-title">Kanal Bulunamadı</div>
      <div class="empty-sub">Aramanızı değiştirin veya playlist yükleyin</div>
      <button class="btn btn-sm mt-2" id="chEmptyAddBtn">+ Kaynak Ekle</button></div>`;
    const cl=$('#chCountLabel');if(cl) cl.textContent='0 kanal';
    const eb=$('#chEmptyAddBtn');if(eb) eb.onclick=()=>Modal.open('addSource');
    return;
  }

  container.innerHTML=list.map((ch,i)=>{
    const fav=App.favorites.has(ch.id);
    const playing=App.playingCh?.id===ch.id;
    const qualIcon=ch.quality==='4K'?'🟢':ch.quality==='FHD'?'🔵':ch.quality==='HD'?'🟡':'⚪';
    return`<div class="ch-item${playing?' selected':''}" data-id="${ch.id}" data-idx="${i}"
      tabindex="0" role="button" aria-label="${ch.name}">
      <div class="ch-num">${ch.number||i+1}</div>
      <div class="ch-logo-wrap">
        ${ch.logo?`<img class="ch-logo" src="${ch.logo}" alt="" loading="lazy" onerror="this.parentElement.innerHTML='📺'"/>`
          :'<span class="ch-logo-placeholder">📺</span>'}
      </div>
      <div class="ch-info">
        <div class="ch-name truncate">${ch.name}</div>
        <div class="ch-group">${ch.group||''} ${qualIcon}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ch-actions">
        <button class="ch-fav-btn" data-id="${ch.id}" title="Favori">${fav?'⭐':'☆'}</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');

  const ccl=$('#chCountLabel');if(ccl) ccl.textContent=list.length+' kanal';

  container.querySelectorAll('.ch-item').forEach(el=>{
    el.onclick=e=>{
      if(e.target.closest('.ch-fav-btn'))return;
      const ch=App.channels.find(c=>c.id==el.dataset.id);
      if(ch) selectChannel(ch);
    };
    el.oncontextmenu=e=>{
      e.preventDefault();
      const ch=App.channels.find(c=>c.id==el.dataset.id);
      if(ch){App._ctxChannel=ch;showContextMenu(e.clientX,e.clientY)}
    };
  });

  container.querySelectorAll('.ch-fav-btn').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.onclick=e=>{
      e.stopPropagation();
      toggleFavorite(btn.dataset.id);
    };
  });
}

$$('.ch-filter-btn').forEach(btn=>{
  btn.onclick=()=>{
    $$('.ch-filter-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    renderChannelList();
  };
});

const cs=$('#chSort');if(cs) cs.onchange=()=>renderChannelList();

const chSearchEl=$('#chSearch');
if(chSearchEl){
  chSearchEl.oninput=debounce(()=>renderChannelList(),200);
  const csc=$('#chSearchClear');
  if(csc) csc.onclick=()=>{chSearchEl.value='';renderChannelList();chSearchEl.focus()};
}

const ccb=$('#chCollapseBtn');if(ccb) ccb.onclick=()=>{
  $$('.cat-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
  $$('.cat-tab[data-cat="all"]').forEach(t=>t.classList.add('active'));
  renderChannelList();
};

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// CATEGORY TABS
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function renderCategoryTabs(){
  const container=$('#catTabs');if(!container)return;
  buildChannelGroups();

  let html=`<div class="cat-tab active" data-cat="all">Tümü (${App.channels.length})</div>`;
  App.groups.forEach(g=>{
    html+=`<div class="cat-tab" data-cat="${g.name}">${g.name} (${g.count})</div>`;
  });
  container.innerHTML=html;

  container.querySelectorAll('.cat-tab').forEach(tab=>{
    tab.onclick=()=>{
      container.querySelectorAll('.cat-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
      tab.classList.add('active');
      renderChannelList();
    };
  });
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// FAVORITES
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function toggleFavorite(id){
  if(App.favorites.has(id)){App.favorites.delete(id);Toast.info('Favorilerden kaldırıldı')}
  else{App.favorites.add(id);Toast.success('Favorilere eklendi ⭐')}
  saveState();renderChannelList();updateFavCount();
}

function updateFavCount(){
  const c=App.favorites.size;
  const el=$('#favCount');if(el)el.textContent=c;
  const el2=$('#favCountLabel');if(el2)el2.textContent=c+' öğe';
}

function renderFavorites(){
  const container=$('#favList');if(!container)return;
  const favChannels=App.channels.filter(c=>App.favorites.has(c.id));
  if(!favChannels.length){
    container.innerHTML=`<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">⭐</div>
      <div class="empty-title">Favori Yok</div>
      <div class="empty-sub">Kanallara ⭐ tıklayarak favorilere ekle</div></div>`;
    return;
  }
  container.innerHTML=favChannels.map(ch=>`
    <div class="ch-item" data-id="${ch.id}">
      <div class="ch-logo-wrap">
        ${ch.logo?`<img class="ch-logo" src="${ch.logo}" alt="" loading="lazy"/>`
          :'<span class="ch-logo-placeholder">📺</span>'}
      </div>
      <div class="ch-info">
        <div class="ch-name truncate">${ch.name}</div>
        <div class="ch-group">${ch.group||''}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ch-actions">
        <button class="ch-fav-btn active" data-id="${ch.id}" title="Kaldır">⭐</button>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');

  container.querySelectorAll('.ch-item').forEach(el=>{
    el.onclick=e=>{
      if(e.target.closest('.ch-fav-btn'))return;
      const ch=App.channels.find(c=>c.id==el.dataset.id);
      if(ch)selectChannel(ch);
    };
  });
  container.querySelectorAll('.ch-fav-btn').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.onclick=e=>{e.stopPropagation();toggleFavorite(btn.dataset.id)}
  });
}

const fcb=$('#favClearBtn');if(fcb) fcb.onclick=async()=>{
  if(await Modal.confirm('Tüm favorileri temizlemek istediğine emin misin?')){
    App.favorites.clear();saveState();renderFavorites();updateFavCount();
    Toast.success('Favoriler temizlendi');
  }
};

const feb=$('#favExportBtn');if(feb) feb.onclick=()=>{
  const favChannels=App.channels.filter(c=>App.favorites.has(c.id));
  const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(favChannels,null,2)],{type:'application/json'});
  downloadBlob(blob,'streamvault_favorites.json');
  Toast.success('Dışa aktarıldı');
};

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// CONTEXT MENU
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function showContextMenu(x,y){
  const menu=$('#ctxMenu');if(!menu)return;
  menu.style.left=Math.min(x,window.innerWidth-200)+'px';
  menu.style.top=Math.min(y,window.innerHeight-300)+'px';
  menu.classList.add('ctx-show');
}

function hideContextMenu(){const m=$('#ctxMenu');if(m) m.classList.remove('ctx-show')}

const ctxMenu=$('#ctxMenu');
if(ctxMenu) ctxMenu.addEventListener('click',e=>{
  const item=e.target.closest('.ctx-item');
  if(!item)return;
  const action=item.dataset.action;
  const ch=App._ctxChannel;
  if(!ch)return;

  switch(action){
    case 'play':selectChannel(ch);break;
    case 'fav':toggleFavorite(ch.id);break;
    case 'info':Toast.info(ch.name+' - '+(ch.group||'')+' - '+(ch.quality||''));break;
    case 'copy':
      navigator.clipboard?.writeText(ch.url).then(()=>Toast.success('URL kopyalandı'));
      break;
    case 'timer':addDVRTimer(ch);break;
    case 'remove':
      App.channels=App.channels.filter(c=>c.id!==ch.id);
      saveState();renderChannelList();renderCategoryTabs();
      Toast.info('Kanal kaldırıldı');break;
  }
  hideContextMenu();
});

document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
  if(!e.target.closest('.ctx-menu'))hideContextMenu();
});
document.addEventListener('contextmenu',e=>{
  if(!e.target.closest('.ch-item'))hideContextMenu();
});

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// COMMAND PALETTE
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

let cmdOpen=false;

function openCommandPalette(){
  const overlay=$('#cmdOverlay');if(!overlay)return;
  overlay.classList.add('cmd-open');
  const ci=$('#cmdInput');if(ci){ci.value='';ci.focus()}
  cmdOpen=true;
  renderCommandRecent();
}

function closeCommandPalette(){
  const o=$('#cmdOverlay');if(o) o.classList.remove('cmd-open');
  cmdOpen=false;
}

const tcb=$('#tbCmdBtn');if(tcb) tcb.onclick=openCommandPalette;
const cmdOv=$('#cmdOverlay');if(cmdOv) cmdOv.onclick=e=>{if(e.target===e.currentTarget)closeCommandPalette()};
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
  if((e.ctrlKey||e.metaKey)&&e.key==='k'){e.preventDefault();openCommandPalette()}
  if(e.key==='Escape'&&cmdOpen)closeCommandPalette();
});

const cmdInput=$('#cmdInput');
if(cmdInput) cmdInput.oninput=debounce(function(){
  const q=this.value.toLowerCase().trim();
  if(!q){renderCommandRecent();return}

  const results=App.channels.filter(c=>
    c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)||
    (c.group||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)
  ).slice(0,10);

  const container=$('#cmdRecentList');if(!container)return;
  if(!results.length){
    container.innerHTML=`<div class="empty"><div class="empty-title">Sonuç yok</div></div>`;
    return;
  }

  container.innerHTML=results.map(ch=>`
    <div class="cmd-item" data-ch-id="${ch.id}">
      <span class="cmd-item-icon">📺</span>
      <div><div class="cmd-item-name">${highlight(ch.name,q)}</div>
      <div class="cmd-item-sub">${ch.group||''}</div></div>
    </div>`).join('');

  container.querySelectorAll('.cmd-item[data-ch-id]').forEach(el=>{
    el.onclick=()=>{
      const ch=App.channels.find(c=>c.id==el.dataset.chId);
      if(ch){selectChannel(ch);navigate('live');closeCommandPalette()}
    };
  });
},150);

function highlight(text,query){
  if(!query)return text;
  const idx=text.toLowerCase().indexOf(query.toLowerCase());
  if(idx<0)return text;
  return text.slice(0,idx)+'<mark>'+text.slice(idx,idx+query.length)+'</mark>'+text.slice(idx+query.length);
}

function renderCommandRecent(){
  const container=$('#cmdRecentList');if(!container)return;
  const recent=App.watchHistory.slice(0,5).map(h=>{
    const ch=App.channels.find(c=>c.id===h.ch_id);
    return ch;
  }).filter(Boolean);

  if(!recent.length){
    container.innerHTML=`<div class="empty"><div class="empty-title">Henüz kanal seçilmedi</div></div>`;
    return;
  }

  container.innerHTML=recent.map(ch=>`
    <div class="cmd-item" data-ch-id="${ch.id}">
      <span class="cmd-item-icon">📺</span>
      <div><div class="cmd-item-name">${ch.name}</div>
      <div class="cmd-item-sub">${ch.group||''}</div></div>
    </div>`).join('');

  container.querySelectorAll('.cmd-item[data-ch-id]').forEach(el=>{
    el.onclick=()=>{
      const ch=App.channels.find(c=>c.id==el.dataset.chId);
      if(ch){selectChannel(ch);navigate('live');closeCommandPalette()}
    };
  });
}

$$('.cmd-item[data-cmd]').forEach(el=>{
  el.onclick=()=>{
    const cmd=el.dataset.cmd;
    switch(cmd){
      case 'epg':navigate('epg');break;
      case 'stats':navigate('stats');break;
      case 'screenshot':takeScreenshot();break;
      case 'fullscreen':toggleFullscreen();break;
      case 'theme':cycleTheme();break;
      case 'pip':activatePIP();break;
    }
    closeCommandPalette();
  };
});

function cycleTheme(){
  const themes=['dark','amoled','navy','light','blue','purple','green','gold'];
  let idx=themes.indexOf(App.settings.theme);
  idx=(idx+1)%themes.length;
  App.settings.theme=themes[idx];
  document.body.dataset.theme=themes[idx];
  saveState();
  Toast.success('Tema: '+themes[idx]);
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// GLOBAL SEARCH
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

const globalSearchEl=$('#globalSearch');
if(globalSearchEl){
  const dropdown=$('#searchDropdown');

  globalSearchEl.onfocus=()=>{
    if(dropdown) dropdown.classList.add('search-dd-show');
    runGlobalSearch();
  };

  globalSearchEl.oninput=debounce(runGlobalSearch,200);

  document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    if(!e.target.closest('.search-wrap')&&dropdown)
      dropdown.classList.remove('search-dd-show');
  });

  function runGlobalSearch(){
    if(!dropdown)return;
    const q=globalSearchEl.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    if(!q){
      const recent=App.watchHistory.slice(0,6);
      if(!recent.length){dropdown.innerHTML='<div class="empty"><div class="empty-title">Arama geçmişin yok</div></div>';return}
      dropdown.innerHTML=`<div class="search-section-label">🕐 Son İzlenen</div>`+
        recent.map(h=>{
          const ch=App.channels.find(c=>c.id===h.ch_id);
          return ch?`<div class="search-result" data-ch-id="${ch.id}">
            <span>📺</span><div><div class="fw-7">${ch.name}</div>
            <div class="fs-xs text-muted">${ch.group||''}</div></div></div>`:'';
        }).join('');
      bindSearchResults();return;
    }

    const chResults=App.channels.filter(c=>c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)).slice(0,6);
    const movieResults=App.channels.filter(c=>c.type==='movie'&&c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)).slice(0,4);

    let html='';
    if(chResults.length) html+=`<div class="search-section-label">📺 Kanallar</div>`+
      chResults.map(c=>`<div class="search-result" data-ch-id="${c.id}">
        <span>📺</span><div><div class="fw-7">${highlight(c.name,q)}</div>
        <div class="fs-xs text-muted">${c.group||''}</div></div></div>`).join('');
    if(movieResults.length) html+=`<div class="search-section-label">🎬 Filmler</div>`+
      movieResults.map(c=>`<div class="search-result" data-ch-id="${c.id}">
        <span>🎬</span><div><div class="fw-7">${highlight(c.name,q)}</div>
        <div class="fs-xs text-muted">Film</div></div></div>`).join('');
    if(!html) html=`<div class="empty"><div class="empty-title">Sonuç bulunamadı</div></div>`;

    dropdown.innerHTML=html;
    bindSearchResults();
  }

  function bindSearchResults(){
    if(!dropdown)return;
    dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-result').forEach(el=>{
      el.onclick=()=>{
        const ch=App.channels.find(c=>c.id==el.dataset.chId);
        if(ch){selectChannel(ch);navigate('live')}
        dropdown.classList.remove('search-dd-show');
        globalSearchEl.blur();
      };
    });
  }
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// VOICE SEARCH
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

const vsb=$('#voiceSearchBtn');
if(vsb) vsb.onclick=()=>{
  if(!('webkitSpeechRecognition' in window)&&!('SpeechRecognition' in window)){
    Toast.error('Sesli arama desteklenmiyor');return;
  }
  const SR=window.SpeechRecognition||window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
  const rec=new SR();
  rec.lang='tr-TR';rec.interimResults=false;
  rec.onresult=e=>{
    const text=e.results[0][0].transcript;
    if(globalSearchEl){globalSearchEl.value=text;globalSearchEl.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'))}
    Toast.info('Duyulan: "'+text+'"');
  };
  rec.onerror=()=>Toast.error('Ses tanınamadı');
  rec.start();
  vsb.textContent='🔴';
  rec.onend=()=>{vsb.textContent='🎤'};
};

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// NOTIFICATION CENTER
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function addNotification(title,body,type='info',icon='🔔'){
  const n={id:uuid(),title,body,type,icon,ts:Date.now(),read:false};
  App.notifications.unshift(n);
  App.notifications=App.notifications.slice(0,50);
  renderNotifications();
  if(App.settings.notifSound) playBeep(523,0.1);
  return n;
}

function renderNotifications(){
  const list=$('#notifList');if(!list)return;
  if(!App.notifications.length){
    list.innerHTML=`<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">🔕</div>
      <div class="empty-title">Bildirim yok</div></div>`;return;
  }
  list.innerHTML=App.notifications.map(n=>`
    <div class="notif-item${n.read?' notif-read':''}" data-id="${n.id}">
      <span class="notif-icon">${n.icon}</span>
      <div class="notif-body">
        <div class="notif-title-sm">${n.title}</div>
        <div class="notif-body-sm">${n.body}</div>
        <div class="notif-time">${fmtDate(n.ts)}</div>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
  const unread=App.notifications.some(n=>!n.read);
  const dot=$('#tbNotifDot');
  if(dot)dot.classList.toggle('hidden',!unread);
}

const tnb=$('#tbNotifBtn');if(tnb) tnb.onclick=()=>{
  const nc=$('#notifCenter');if(nc) nc.classList.toggle('notif-center-open');
  App.notifications.forEach(n=>n.read=true);
  renderNotifications();
};

const can=$('#clearAllNotif');if(can) can.onclick=()=>{
  App.notifications=[];renderNotifications();Toast.info('Bildirimler temizlendi');
};

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// DVR
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function addDVRTimer(ch){
  const dtc=$('#dvrTimerCh');
  if(dtc) dtc.innerHTML=App.channels.map(c=>
    `<option value="${c.id}"${c.id===ch.id?' selected':''}>${c.name}</option>`).join('');

  const now=new Date();const later=new Date(now.getTime()+3600000);
  const dts=$('#dvrTimerStart');if(dts) dts.value=now.toISOString().slice(0,16);
  const dte=$('#dvrTimerEnd');if(dte) dte.value=later.toISOString().slice(0,16);
  const dtn=$('#dvrTimerName');if(dtn) dtn.value=ch.name+' - '+fmtDate(now);

  Modal.open('dvr-timer');
}

const dtsBtn=$('#dvrTimerSave');if(dtsBtn) dtsBtn.onclick=()=>{
  const chVal=$('#dvrTimerCh')?.value;
  const timer={
    id:uuid(),
    ch_id:chVal,
    ch_name:App.channels.find(c=>c.id===chVal)?.name||'—',
    start:$('#dvrTimerStart')?.value,
    end:$('#dvrTimerEnd')?.value,
    name:$('#dvrTimerName')?.value,
    repeat:$('#dvrTimerRepeat')?.value||'none',
    marginPre:+($('#dvrTimerMarginPre')?.value)||2,
    marginPost:+($('#dvrTimerMarginPost')?.value)||2,
    status:'pending',
    created:Date.now()
  };
  App.dvrTimers.push(timer);
  saveState();Modal.close();
  Toast.success('Zamanlayıcı eklendi: '+timer.name);
  renderDVR();
  checkDVRSchedule();
};

function renderDVR(){
  renderDVRTab(App._dvrTab||'recordings');
}

function renderDVRTab(tab){
  App._dvrTab=tab;
  const container=$('#dvrContent');if(!container)return;

  if(tab==='recordings'){
    if(!App.dvrRecordings.length){
      container.innerHTML=`<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">📁</div>
        <div class="empty-title">Kayıt Yok</div>
        <div class="empty-sub">Henüz kayıt bulunmuyor</div></div>`;return;
    }
    container.innerHTML=App.dvrRecordings.map(r=>`
      <div class="dvr-rec-item">
        <div class="dvr-rec-thumb">🎬</div>
        <div class="dvr-rec-info">
          <div class="fw-7">${r.name}</div>
          <div class="fs-xs text-muted">${r.ch_name} • ${fmtDate(r.start)}</div>
          <div class="fs-xs text-muted">Süre: ${fmtDur(r.duration)}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dvr-rec-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm">▶</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" data-del="${r.id}">🗑️</button>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');
  }

  if(tab==='timers'){
    if(!App.dvrTimers.length){
      container.innerHTML=`<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">⏰</div>
        <div class="empty-title">Zamanlayıcı Yok</div></div>`;return;
    }
    container.innerHTML=App.dvrTimers.map(t=>`
      <div class="dvr-timer-item">
        <div class="dvr-timer-status ${
          t.status==='pending'?'st-pending':t.status==='recording'?'st-rec':'st-done'}">
          ${t.status==='recording'?'🔴':t.status==='pending'?'⏳':'✅'}
        </div>
        <div class="dvr-timer-info">
          <div class="fw-7">${t.name}</div>
          <div class="fs-xs text-muted">${t.ch_name} • ${fmtDate(t.start)} → ${fmtDate(t.end)}</div>
          <div class="fs-xs text-muted">Tekrar: ${
            {none:'Yok',daily:'Her Gün',weekly:'Her Hafta',weekdays:'Haftaiçi'}[t.repeat]||'Yok'}</div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" data-del-timer="${t.id}">🗑️</button>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');

    container.querySelectorAll('[data-del-timer]').forEach(btn=>{
      btn.onclick=()=>{
        App.dvrTimers=App.dvrTimers.filter(t=>t.id!==btn.dataset.delTimer);
        saveState();renderDVR();Toast.info('Zamanlayıcı silindi');
      };
    });
  }

  if(tab==='schedule'){
    container.innerHTML=renderDVRSchedule();
  }
}

function renderDVRSchedule(){
  const upcoming=App.dvrTimers.filter(t=>t.status==='pending')
    .sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.start)-new Date(b.start))
    .slice(0,20);

  if(!upcoming.length) return `<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">📅</div>
    <div class="empty-title">Zamanlayıcı Yok</div></div>`;

  return `<div class="dvr-schedule">${upcoming.map(t=>`
    <div class="dvr-sched-item">
      <div class="dvr-sched-time">${new Date(t.start).toLocaleTimeString('tr-TR',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}</div>
      <div class="dvr-sched-name">${t.name}</div>
      <div class="dvr-sched-ch">${t.ch_name}</div>
    </div>`).join('')}</div>`;
}

function checkDVRSchedule(){
  const now=new Date();
  App.dvrTimers.forEach(t=>{
    if(t.status!=='pending')return;
    const start=new Date(new Date(t.start).getTime()-(t.marginPre||2)*60000);
    if(now>=start&&now<=new Date(t.end)){
      t.status='recording';
      addNotification('Kayıt Başladı',t.ch_name+' kaydediliyor…','info','⏺️');
      Toast.success('⏺ Kayıt başladı: '+t.name);
      saveState();
    }
  });
}
setInterval(checkDVRSchedule,30000);

const dnt=$('#dvrNewTimer');if(dnt) dnt.onclick=()=>{
  const ch=App.playingCh||App.channels[0];
  if(ch)addDVRTimer(ch);
  else Toast.warn('Önce bir kanal seçin');
};

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// EPG ENGINE
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function generateDemoEPG(ch){
  const events=[];
  const now=new Date();
  const base=new Date(now.getFullYear(),now.getMonth(),now.getDate(),0,0,0);
  const programs=[
    'Sabah Haberleri','Günlük Dizi','Spor Saati','Öğle Haberleri',
    'Film Kuşağı','Magazin','Akşam Haberleri','Prime Time Dizi',
    'Gece Haberleri','Film','Talk Show','Gece Kuşağı'
  ];

  let time=base.getTime();
  let idx=0;
  for(let h=0;h<24;h+=2){
    events.push({
      ch_id:ch.id,ch_name:ch.name,start:time,end:time+7200000,
      title:programs[idx%programs.length],
      desc:ch.name+' kanalında '+programs[idx%programs.length]+' programı.',
      genre:['Haber','Dizi','Spor','Film','Eğlence'][idx%5],
      rating:Math.random()>0.7?'12+':null
    });
    time+=7200000;idx++;
  }
  return events;
}

let epgData={};
function loadEPG(){
  App.channels.forEach(ch=>{
    epgData[ch.id]=generateDemoEPG(ch);
  });
}

function getNowProgram(chId){
  const events=epgData[chId];if(!events)return null;
  const now=Date.now();
  return events.find(e=>now>=e.start&&now<e.end);
}
function getNextProgram(chId){
  const events=epgData[chId];if(!events)return null;
  const now=Date.now();
  const current=events.findIndex(e=>now>=e.start&&now<e.end);
  return current>=0&&current<events.length-1?events[current+1]:events[0];
}

function updateEPGStrip(ch){
  if(!ch)return;
  const now=getNowProgram(ch.id);
  const next=getNextProgram(ch.id);

  const nowEl=$('#epgNow');
  const nextEl=$('#epgNext');
  const fillEl=$('#epgNowFill');

  if(now&&nowEl){
    nowEl.innerHTML=`<div class="fw-7 truncate">${now.title}</div>
      <div class="fs-xs text-muted">${fmtDur((now.end-Date.now())/1000)} kaldı</div>`;
    if(fillEl){
      const pct=clamp(((Date.now()-now.start)/(now.end-now.start))*100,0,100);
      fillEl.style.width=pct+'%';
    }
  }
  if(next&&nextEl){
    nextEl.innerHTML=`<div class="fw-7 truncate">${next.title}</div>
      <div class="fs-xs text-muted">${fmtDate(next.start)}</div>`;
  }
}

function renderEPGPage(){
  const grid=$('#epgGrid');const ruler=$('#epgRuler');
  const scroll=$('#epgGridScroll');
  if(!grid||!ruler)return;

  let rulerHtml='';
  for(let h=0;h<24;h++){
    rulerHtml+=`<div class="epg-ruler-hour" style="left:${h*180}px">${String(h).padStart(2,'0')}:00</div>`;
  }
  ruler.innerHTML=rulerHtml;
  ruler.style.width=(24*180)+'px';

  let html='';
  App.channels.slice(0,50).forEach(ch=>{
    const events=epgData[ch.id]||[];
    html+=`<div class="epg-row">
      <div class="epg-row-ch">${ch.name}</div>
      <div class="epg-row-events">`;
    events.forEach(ev=>{
      const w=((ev.end-ev.start)/7200000)*180;
      const left=((new Date(ev.start).getHours()*3600+new Date(ev.start).getMinutes()*60)/7200)*180;
      const now=Date.now();
      const isActive=now>=ev.start&&now<ev.end;
      html+=`<div class="epg-event${isActive?' epg-event-active':''}" style="width:${w}px;left:${left}px"
        data-ev='${JSON.stringify({ch_id:ev.ch_id,title:ev.title,start:ev.start,end:ev.end,desc:ev.desc})}'>
        <div class="epg-event-title truncate">${ev.title}</div>
        ${isActive?`<div class="epg-event-progress" style="width:${clamp(((now-ev.start)/(ev.end-ev.start))*100,0,100)}%"></div>`:''}
      </div>`;
    });
    html+=`</div></div>`;
  });
  grid.innerHTML=html;

  grid.querySelectorAll('.epg-event').forEach(el=>{
    el.onclick=()=>{
      try{
        const data=JSON.parse(el.dataset.ev);
        showEPGDetail(data);
      }catch(e){}
    };
  });

  const now=new Date();
  const scrollX=(now.getHours()*3600+now.getMinutes()*60)/7200*180-200;
  if(scroll) scroll.scrollLeft=scrollX;

  const ejn=$('#epgJumpNow');
  if(ejn) ejn.onclick=()=>{if(scroll) scroll.scrollLeft=scrollX};

  const daySel=$('#epgDaySelect');
  if(daySel){
    const days=['Pazartesi','Salı','Çarşamba','Perşembe','Cuma','Cumartesi','Pazar'];
    const today=new Date().getDay();
    daySel.innerHTML='';
    for(let i=0;i<7;i++){
      const d=(today+i)%7;
      daySel.innerHTML+=`<option value="${i}">${i===0?'Bugün':days[d]}</option>`;
    }
  }
}

function showEPGDetail(ev){
  const et=$('#epgDetailTitle');if(et) et.textContent=ev.title;
  const dur=(ev.end-ev.start)/60000;
  const chName=App.channels.find(c=>c.id===ev.ch_id)?.name||ev.ch_name||'—';
  const eb=$('#epgDetailBody');
  if(eb) eb.innerHTML=`
    <div class="epg-detail-meta">
      <div><span class="text-muted">Kanal:</span> ${chName}</div>
      <div><span class="text-muted">Başlangıç:</span> ${fmtDate(ev.start)}</div>
      <div><span class="text-muted">Süre:</span> ${dur} dk</div>
      ${ev.genre?`<div><span class="text-muted">Tür:</span> ${ev.genre}</div>`:''}
    </div>
    ${ev.desc?`<p class="mt-2" style="color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.6">${ev.desc}</p>`:''}`;

  const edp=$('#epgDetailPlay');
  if(edp) edp.onclick=()=>{
    const ch=App.channels.find(c=>c.id===ev.ch_id);
    if(ch){selectChannel(ch);navigate('live')}
    Modal.close();
  };
  const edr=$('#epgDetailRecord');
  if(edr) edr.onclick=()=>{
    const ch=App.channels.find(c=>c.id===ev.ch_id);
    if(ch)addDVRTimer(ch);
    Modal.close();
  };
  Modal.open('epg-detail');
}

setInterval(()=>{
  if(App.playingCh&&App.currentPage==='live') updateEPGStrip(App.playingCh);
},30000);

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// BANDWIDTH & QUALITY MONITORING
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function updateBandwidth(bw){
  App.bitrates.push({t:Date.now(),bw});
  if(App.bitrates.length>60)App.bitrates.shift();

  const avg=App.bitrates.slice(-10).reduce((s,b)=>s+b.bw,0)/Math.min(App.bitrates.length,10);
  const bwd=$('#bwDown');if(bwd) bwd.textContent=(avg/1e6).toFixed(1)+' Mbps';

  const buf=App.player?.buffered;
  if(buf&&buf.length){
    const buffered=buf.end(buf.length-1)-App.player.currentTime;
    const bwb=$('#bwBuf');if(bwb) bwb.textContent=Math.round(buffered)+'s buffer';
  }
}

function updateQualityBars(){
  const bw=parseFloat($('#bwDown')?.textContent)||0;
  const level=bw>8?4:bw>4?3:bw>2?2:bw>0.5?1:0;
  ['qb1','qb2','qb3','qb4'].forEach((id,i)=>{
    const bar=$('#'+id);if(bar) bar.classList.toggle('active',i<level);
  });
}
setInterval(updateQualityBars,5000);

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// SPECTRUM VISUALIZER
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function startSpectrum(){
  if(!App.player)return;
  try{
    if(!App.audioCtx){
      App.audioCtx=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
      const source=App.audioCtx.createMediaElementSource(App.player);
      const analyser=App.audioCtx.createAnalyser();
      analyser.fftSize=256;
      source.connect(analyser);analyser.connect(App.audioCtx.destination);
      App._analyser=analyser;
    }

    const canvas=$('#spectrumCanvas');if(!canvas)return;
    const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
    canvas.width=256;canvas.height=80;
    const analyser=App._analyser;
    const bufLen=analyser.frequencyBinCount;
    const dataArr=new Uint8Array(bufLen);

    cancelAnimationFrame(App.spectrumAnim);
    (function draw(){
      App.spectrumAnim=requestAnimationFrame(draw);
      analyser.getByteFrequencyData(dataArr);
      ctx.clearRect(0,0,256,80);
      const barW=256/bufLen*2.5;
      let x=0;
      for(let i=0;i<bufLen;i++){
        const barH=dataArr[i]/255*80;
        const hue=i/bufLen*280+200;
        ctx.fillStyle=`hsla(${hue},80%,60%,0.7)`;
        ctx.fillRect(x,80-barH,barW-1,barH);
        x+=barW;
      }
    })();
  }catch(e){C.warn('Spectrum failed:',e)}
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// PLAYLIST EDITOR
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function renderPlaylistEditor(){
  const sidebar=$('#pleSidebar');const editor=$('#pleEditor');if(!sidebar)return;

  sidebar.innerHTML=`<div class="ple-list">${App.sources.map(s=>`
    <div class="ple-item" data-id="${s.id}">
      <div class="ple-item-name truncate">${s.name}</div>
      <div class="ple-item-info text-muted">${(s.type||'').toUpperCase()} • ${s.count||0} kanal</div>
    </div>`).join('')}</div>
    <button class="btn btn-sm w-full mt-2" id="pleAddSource2">+ Kaynak Ekle</button>`;

  sidebar.querySelectorAll('.ple-item').forEach(el=>{
    el.onclick=()=>{
      const s=App.sources.find(x=>x.id===el.dataset.id);
      if(s&&editor) renderPlaylistEditorDetail(s,editor);
    };
  });

  const pas=$('#pleAddSource2');
  if(pas) pas.onclick=()=>Modal.open('addSource');

  if(editor&&!App.sources.length){
    editor.innerHTML=`<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">📋</div>
      <div class="empty-title">Playlist Seç</div>
      <div class="empty-sub">Sol taraftan playlist seç veya yeni oluştur</div></div>`;
  }
}

function renderPlaylistEditorDetail(source,editor){
  const chs=App.channels.filter(c=>c.sourceId===source.id);
  editor.innerHTML=`
    <div class="ple-detail-header">
      <input class="form-input" value="${source.name}" id="pleEdName"/>
      <div class="ple-detail-actions">
        <button class="btn btn-sm" id="pleSaveBtn">💾 Kaydet</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="pleRefreshBtn">🔄 Yenile</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:var(--danger)" id="pleDeleteBtn">🗑️ Sil</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ple-ch-list">${chs.map(c=>`
      <div class="ple-ch-item">
        <div class="ch-logo-wrap">
          ${c.logo?`<img class="ch-logo" src="${c.logo}" alt="" loading="lazy"/>`:''}
        </div>
        <div class="ple-ch-info">
          <div class="fw-7 truncate">${c.name}</div>
          <div class="fs-xs text-muted">${c.group||''} • ${c.url.slice(0,40)}…</div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <button class="icon-btn" data-del="${c.id}">🗑️</button>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('')}</div>`;

  const psb=editor.querySelector('#pleSaveBtn');
  if(psb) psb.onclick=()=>{
    const name=$('#pleEdName');if(name) source.name=name.value;
    saveState();Toast.success('Kaydedildi');renderPlaylistEditor();
  };
  const prb=editor.querySelector('#pleRefreshBtn');
  if(prb) prb.onclick=()=>{refreshSource(source);Toast.info('Yenileniyor…')};
  const pdb=editor.querySelector('#pleDeleteBtn');
  if(pdb) pdb.onclick=async()=>{
    if(await Modal.confirm('Bu kaynağı silmek istediğine emin misin?')){
      App.sources=App.sources.filter(s=>s.id!==source.id);
      App.channels=App.channels.filter(c=>c.sourceId!==source.id);
      saveState();renderPlaylistEditor();renderChannelList();renderCategoryTabs();
      Toast.success('Kaynak silindi');
    }
  };
  editor.querySelectorAll('[data-del]').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.onclick=()=>{
      App.channels=App.channels.filter(c=>c.id!==btn.dataset.del);
      saveState();renderPlaylistEditorDetail(source,editor);renderChannelList();
    };
  });
}

const pib=$('#pleImportBtn');if(pib) pib.onclick=()=>Modal.open('addSource');
const pnb=$('#pleNewBtn');if(pnb) pnb.onclick=()=>Modal.open('addSource');

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// ADD SOURCE MODAL
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

let addSourceStep=1;let addSourceType='m3u';

const asn=$('#addSourceNext');if(asn) asn.onclick=()=>{
  if(addSourceStep===1){
    addSourceStep=2;renderAddSourceStep();
  }else if(addSourceStep===2){
    if(addSourceType==='m3u'&&!( $('#addM3uUrl')?.value )){Toast.error('URL gerekli');return}
    if(addSourceType==='xtream'&&!( $('#addXtHost')?.value )){Toast.error('Host gerekli');return}
    addSourceStep=3;renderAddSourceStep();
    analyzeSource();
  }else if(addSourceStep===3){
    finalizeSource();
  }
};

const asb=$('#addSourceBack');if(asb) asb.onclick=()=>{
  if(addSourceStep>1){addSourceStep--;renderAddSourceStep()}
  else Modal.close();
};

$$('.source-type-card').forEach(card=>{
  card.onclick=()=>{
    $$('.source-type-card').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));
    card.classList.add('active');
    addSourceType=card.dataset.type;
    renderAddSourceStep();
  };
});

function renderAddSourceStep(){
  const set=(id,cls)=>{const e=$('#'+id);if(e) e.classList.toggle('active',cls)};
  set('step1dot',addSourceStep>=1);
  const s1l=$('#step1line');if(s1l) s1l.classList.toggle('active',addSourceStep>=2);
  set('step2dot',addSourceStep>=2);
  const s2l=$('#step2line');if(s2l) s2l.classList.toggle('active',addSourceStep>=3);
  set('step3dot',addSourceStep>=3);

  const setHidden=(id,h)=>{const e=$('#'+id);if(e)e.classList.toggle('hidden',h)};
  setHidden('addStep1',addSourceStep!==1);
  setHidden('addStep2',addSourceStep!==2);
  setHidden('addStep3',addSourceStep!==3);
  setHidden('addM3uForm',addSourceStep!==2||addSourceType!=='m3u');
  setHidden('addXtreamForm',addSourceStep!==2||addSourceType!=='xtream');
  setHidden('addFileForm',addSourceStep!==2||addSourceType!=='file');

  if(asb) asb.textContent=addSourceStep===1?'İptal':'‹ Geri';
  if(asn) asn.textContent=addSourceStep===3?'✓ Tamamla':'İleri ›';
}

async function analyzeSource(){
  const preview=$('#addPreview');if(!preview)return;
  preview.innerHTML=`<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">⏳</div>
    <div class="empty-title">Analiz ediliyor…</div>
    <div class="empty-sub">Bu işlem 10-30 saniye sürebilir</div></div>`;

  await wait(1500);

  let name='';let url='';
  if(addSourceType==='m3u'){
    name=$('#addM3uName')?.value||'M3U Playlist';
    url=$('#addM3uUrl')?.value;
  }else if(addSourceType==='xtream'){
    name='Xtream - '+($('#addXtHost')?.value||'');
    url=$('#addXtHost')?.value;
  }

  try{
    if(url){
      const resp=await fetch(url,{mode:'cors'}).catch(()=>null);
      if(resp&&resp.ok){
        const text=await resp.text();
        const parsed=parseM3U(text);
        preview.innerHTML=`
          <div class="success-state">
            <div class="success-icon">✅</div>
            <div class="success-title">Kaynak Analiz Edildi</div>
            <div class="success-detail">${name}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="stats-grid" style="margin-top:12px">
            <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-val">${parsed.channels.length}</div><div class="stat-label">Kanal</div></div>
            <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-val">${new Set(parsed.channels.map(c=>c.group)).size}</div><div class="stat-label">Kategori</div></div>
            <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-val">${parsed.channels.filter(c=>c.quality==='4K').length}</div><div class="stat-label">4K</div></div>
            <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-val">${parsed.channels.filter(c=>c.quality==='HD').length}</div><div class="stat-label">HD</div></div>
          </div>`;
        App._pendingChannels=parsed.channels;
        App._pendingSourceName=name;
        App._pendingSourceUrl=url;
        return;
      }
    }
  }catch(e){C.warn('Fetch failed:',e)}

  const demoCount=rand(80,300);
  preview.innerHTML=`
    <div class="success-state">
      <div class="success-icon">📊</div>
      <div class="success-title">Kaynak Eklendi</div>
      <div class="success-detail">${name}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-grid" style="margin-top:12px">
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-val">${demoCount}</div><div class="stat-label">Kanal</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-val">${Math.floor(demoCount*0.3)}</div><div class="stat-label">Kategori</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="warning" style="margin-top:12px">⚠️ Demo veri: Gerçek kanallar için geçerli bir URL girin</div>`;

  App._pendingChannels=generateDemoChannels(demoCount);
  App._pendingSourceName=name;
  App._pendingSourceUrl=url;
}

function parseM3U(text){
  const lines=text.split('\n');
  const channels=[];
  let current={};

  lines.forEach(line=>{
    line=line.trim();
    if(line.startsWith('#EXTINF:')){
      const nameMatch=line.match(/,(.+)$/);
      const tvgId=line.match(/tvg-id="([^"]*)"/);
      const tvgLogo=line.match(/tvg-logo="([^"]*)"/);
      const group=line.match(/group-title="([^"]*)"/);
      const quality=line.match(/tvg-quality="([^"]*)"/i)||
        line.match(/(4K|FHD|HD|SD)/i);

      current={
        name:nameMatch?nameMatch[1].trim():'Unknown',
        epg_id:tvgId?tvgId[1]:'',
        logo:tvgLogo?tvgLogo[1]:'',
        group:group?group[1]:'Diğer',
        quality:quality?(quality[1]||'HD'):'HD'
      };
    }else if(line && !line.startsWith('#') && current.name){
      channels.push({
        id:uuid(),name:current.name,url:line,
        group:current.group,logo:current.logo,
        quality:current.quality,epg_id:current.epg_id,
        number:channels.length+1,type:'live',online:true
      });
      current={};
    }
  });

  return{channels};
}

function generateDemoChannels(count){
  const groups=['Haberler','Spor','Sinema','Dizi','Belgesel','Çocuk','Müzik','Yerel','Ulusal','Dünya'];
  const names=['Star','Fox','ATV','Show','TRT','Kanal D','CNNTürk','Habertürk','Bloomberg HT',
    'BeIN Sports','TRT Spor','Sinema TV','DiziMax','National Geographic','Discovery','Cartoon Network',
    'TRT Çocuk','Power TV','Kral TV','NTV','Halk TV','Tele1','KRT','Flash TV','TV8','Star TV',
    'TGRT','Samanyolu','Kanal 7'];
  const quals=['HD','FHD','4K','SD'];

  return Array.from({length:count},(_,i)=>({
    id:uuid(),name:`${names[i%names.length]} ${(Math.floor(i/names.length))||''}`.trim(),
    url:`http://demo.streamvault.local/live/${i}/stream.m3u8`,
    group:groups[i%groups.length],logo:'',
    quality:quals[rand(0,3)],number:i+1,type:'live',online:Math.random()>0.1
  }));
}

function finalizeSource(){
  const name=App._pendingSourceName||'Yeni Kaynak';
  const url=App._pendingSourceUrl||'';
  const channels=App._pendingChannels||[];

  const source={id:uuid(),name,type:addSourceType,url,count:channels.length,added:Date.now()};
  App.sources.push(source);

  channels.forEach(ch=>{
    ch.sourceId=source.id;
    ch.number=App.channels.length+1;
    App.channels.push(ch);
  });

  saveState();
  Modal.close();
  addSourceStep=1;renderAddSourceStep();
  renderChannelList();renderCategoryTabs();updateFavCount();

  Toast.success(`Kaynak eklendi: ${name} (${channels.length} kanal)`);
  addNotification('Kaynak Eklendi',`${channels.length} kanal yüklendi`,'success','📡');
}

function refreshSource(source){
  Toast.info('Kaynak yenileniyor…');
  setTimeout(()=>Toast.success('Kaynak güncellendi'),2000);
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// FILE DROP ZONE
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

const dropZone=$('#m3uDropZone');
const fileInput=$('#m3uFileInput');

if(dropZone&&fileInput){
  dropZone.onclick=()=>fileInput.click();
  dropZone.ondragover=e=>{e.preventDefault();dropZone.classList.add('drop-active')};
  dropZone.ondragleave=()=>dropZone.classList.remove('drop-active');
  dropZone.ondrop=e=>{
    e.preventDefault();dropZone.classList.remove('drop-active');
    const file=e.dataTransfer.files[0];
    if(file) processFile(file);
  };
  fileInput.onchange=()=>{
    if(fileInput.files[0])processFile(fileInput.files[0]);
  };

  function processFile(file){
    const reader=new FileReader();
    reader.onload=()=>{
      const text=reader.result;
      let channels=[];
      if(file.name.endsWith('.json')){
        try{
          const json=JSON.parse(text);
          channels=(json.channels||json).map(c=>({
            id:uuid(),name:c.name||c.title||'Unnamed',url:c.url||c.stream||'',
            group:c.group||c.category||'Diğer',logo:c.logo||c.tvg_logo||'',
            quality:c.quality||'HD',number:0,type:'live',online:true
          }));
        }catch(e){Toast.error('JSON parse hatası')}
      }else{
        channels=parseM3U(text).channels;
      }
      App._pendingChannels=channels;
      const afn=$('#addFileName');if(afn) afn.value=file.name;
      dropZone.innerHTML=`<div class="drop-zone-icon">✅</div>
        <div class="drop-zone-text">${file.name} (${channels.length} kanal)</div>`;
    };
    reader.readAsText(file);
  }
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// SCREENSHOT
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────

function takeScreenshot(){
  const v=App.player;if(!v||v.readyState<2){Toast.error('Oynatıcı hazır değil');return}
  const canvas=$('#screenshotCanvas');if(!canvas)return;
  canvas.width=v.videoWidth||1280;canvas.height=v.videoHeight||720;
  canvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(v,0,0);
